shorts.title_distilled: Lackawanna County polling place permanently moving.
shorts.description: MOOSIC, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A notice for voters in Lackawanna County: One polling place is moving permanently. The polling location for Moosic Ward 4 is changing from the Greenwood Hose Company on Birney Avenue to the Moosic Youth Center on Main Street. The Lackawanna County Board of Elections approved the move during a meeting [...]
shorts.content: MOOSIC, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A notice for voters in Lackawanna County: One polling place is moving permanently. The polling location for Moosic Ward 4 is changing from the Greenwood Hose Company on Birney Avenue to the Moosic Youth Center on Main Street. The Lackawanna County Board of Elections approved the move during a meeting [...]
